biography: Tomas is a familiar face around the Espoo Ringside Golf club and a name that resonates with golf aficionados. A golfer known for his thoughtful approach to the game, Tomas has a style that many admire.
Tomas has participated in the Hector Trophée on three occasions. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication to golf remains unwavering.
Although Tomas is considered to be retired from Hector Trophée events, his passion for golf is undeniable, and it is not impossible that we will see him again in the future.
